texto: Resist the short term temptation of procrastination
autor: the immediate pleasure and relief that it brings does not fair in comparison to the long lasting damage it does to your dreams and goals.
explicacao: Citação de the immediate pleasure and relief that it brings does not fair in comparison to the long lasting damage it does to your dreams and goals. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Resist the short term temptation of procrastination” articula reflexao, noel-dejesus, resist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
